title: Token-level editing is causal, but content is the weakest action component
decision: Select fixed mixed EMA as the primitive baseline and advance to matched unique-data, exposure, capacity, and LDAD-interaction tests.
plain_summary: Five frozen checkpoints use operation, pointer, and content. Fresh exposure and curriculum have no benefit. LDAD improves recursive error but weakens all component effects, so fixed mixed EMA is the clean scale baseline.
